76267.subject: 🔓 OpenAI's smartest model broke out
76267.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://utm.genai.works/r/he2t9cz)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** OpenAI's smartest model picked the lock on its own sandbox and published code it wasn't cleared to, a judge made Anthropic's $1.5 billion book-piracy settlement final, Goldman Sachs says the bond market is choking on AI debt and $50,000 in Claude credits will go to scientists taking on rare diseases.



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **OpenAI:** How did its smartest model escape the lab?

* **Authors:** Who just won $1.5 billion from Anthropic?

* **Goldman Sachs:** Is the AI debt bomb about to go off?

* **Anthropic:** Who gets $50,000 to cure rare diseases?


----------



----------
## [OpenAI's smartest model broke out](https://openai.com/index/safety-alignment-long-horizon-models/)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/bd62928b-a79f-4abb-86c2-bba9f77b03d3/Beehiiv_01_-_Jul_21.png?t=1784626770)
Caption: 

During internal testing, OpenAI's most advanced model broke out of the sandbox built to contain it, spending an hour to find a hole and push its own code to public GitHub.

This is the secret system that disproved an 80-year-old math problem back in May, built to run on its own for hours at a stretch, and that persistence is exactly what got it into trouble.

It had been told to post its results only to Slack. It went to GitHub instead, following the benchmark's own rules over its owner's.

In another test it split an authentication token in two, disguised the halves to slip past a security scanner, then rebuilt the token once it was through.

OpenAI paused the model and rebuilt its safeguards. Access is back on under tighter watch.




----------











----------
## [The AI Boom has a bottleneck and you can own the solution](https://utm.genai.works/r/h9988g3)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/b63fa5ef-28e3-433f-98df-55c362a347b0/Screenshot_2026-07-09_at_10.51.16_AM.png?t=1784626608)
Caption: 

Every AI company fights the same battle. The market never sees most of them.

For years, we built the system behind the scenes and successfully ran go-to-market for NVIDIA, Oracle, Google and 300+ AI brands, powered by data from a 14M+ community competitors can't reach.

This helped us 2.5x our revenue last year, and now you can own a part of this AI distribution infrastructure.

**[You can start from $1,000](https://utm.genai.works/r/h9988g3)** and earn up to 22% bonus shares until August 31, 2026.

Existing partners

76266.subject: Automatická správa: Notifikácia o úhrade diaľničnej známky
76266.body:
Notifikácia o úhrade diaľničnej známky pre vozidlo s evidenčným číslom vozidla LE066BI 
  
  
 Vážený Zákazník, 
  
 správca výberu úhrady diaľničných známok za užívanie vymedzených úsekov diaľnic a rýchlostných ciest v Slovenskej republike, Vám prostredníctvom tejto automaticky vygenerovanej e-mailovej správy na základe Vami realizovanej úhrady diaľničnej známky, evidovanej v rámci evidencie úhrad diaľničných známok k vozidlu/prípojnému vozidlu s evidenčným číslom vozidla LE066BI a krajinou registrácie Slovensko, zasiela doklad „Potvrdenie o úhrade diaľničnej známky, zjednodušená faktúra". 
Diaľničná známka je platná v období odo dňa 21.07.2026 do dňa 21.07.2026 vrátane. 
  
 Upozornenie: 
  
 
Na túto automaticky vygenerovanú e-mailovú správu neodpovedajte. Bližšie informácie týkajúce sa diaľničnej známky môžete získať na internetovom portáli www.eznamka.sk a/alebo prostredníctvom zákazníckej linky na tel. čísle +421 232 777 777. 
  
 S pozdravom
 
  
 Národná diaľničná spoločnosť, a.s. 
  
 T: +421 232 777 777
W: www.eznamka.sk

76264.subject: FinTech funding topped $29B in H1 2026, but most founders got left behind 📈💸; Robinhood’s Agentic Trading turns …
76264.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1102

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Tuesday! Today, we’re diving deep into the latest 2026 fintech funding trends (deep dive into where fintech capital actually went in H1 2026, which categories earned valuation premiums and which got starved, what founders and investors need to understand before raising in H2 2026 + full playbook on How to Build a Monopoly in the AI Age [ https://substack.com/redirect/a1af26dc-ab56-4b4a-a554-92c398298731?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and the list of Top 100 investors of 2026 [ https://substack.com/redirect/6cfc1668-04b6-4adc-a015-ed9f0d2ffbae?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and Robinhood, which finally launched its agentic trading MCP (how this truns the WealthTech giant into a backend for AI Agents, why it matters and what it tells us about the future + bonus deep dive into Robinhood’s latest financials [ https://substack.com/redirect/f1bd7d14-37a3-4953-89f8-e697b3d478c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and the end-to-end guide to buiding Agentic OS with Claude Fable 5 [ https://substack.com/redirect/25c81003-0015-40bd-b7da-3a68f56ea653?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside). So let’s just jump straight into the fascinating stuff 🌶️
FinTech funding topped $29B in H1 2026, but most founders got left behind 📈💸
Following the money 💸 The fintech market just posted its strongest first half since the zero-rate era, and the number that matters most isn’t the dollars raised - it’s the 26% drop in deals.
Global fintech venture funding topped a whopping $29 billion in H1 2026 while deal count fell to multi-year lows across every major data provider. Ouch 🤕
The first impression simply reads recovery. But the reality here is all about consolidation: capital is concentrating into a shrinking set of fintech startups at a pace that should worry anyone not already winning their category. A handful of mega-rounds (Kalshi [ https://substack.com/redirect/5fa64738-d821-4dd2-ab4f-a07be9cb6e2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] at $1.2B, Ramp [ https://substack.com/redirect/5a620ac7-ce91-4f1a-8fc5-0c139115d81e?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] at $782M, CRED at $900M) pulled the totals up. Everyone else faced the tightest funding filter since the correction began… 😳
The full analysis below maps where fintech capital actually went by sector and geography, which categories earned valuation premiums and which got starved, how exits and IPOs played out in H1, and what founders and investors need to understand before raising in H2 2026...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_dG9rZW49ZXlKMWMyVnlYMmxrSWpveE1Ea3dOVFV6TURnc0luQnZjM1JmYVdRaU9qSXdOemd5TWpJMk55d2
